title: 4chan
description: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

Now, all he wants is a quiet life in Los Angeles—running his auto repair shop, grilling in the backyard, and raising his family. items.content_text: i have not been here in many years, but i liked this site in high school. eventually developed severe malnutritition and likely permanent brain damage as a result. linux is too difficult for me these days. computers no longer have a mystical appeal. so these are what i use on my pc and phone. easy to operate while not being completely bogged-down with nonsense. a good middle ground, i suppose. sorry. feel free to ask questions or simply ignore this.

items.title: /v/ Video Games: Trails in the Sky
items.content_text: Seriously, what's the point? As a newcomer, why should I bother with this game when it's part of a multi-series saga and nearly every event (if the memes are to be believed) is almost inconsequential anyway. It's like reading the entire LotR trilogy only to be told everything was just a footnote in the "real" story. Sauron was just a pawn and Frodo now has to carry an even deadlier, more evil ring to an even more imposing lava mountain. And this whole shit escalates and repeats ad infinitum. I r

Sounds like bullshit, but it wasn't. Drivetrain is unbelievably strong, frame is rock solid. The body is fucked up a bit but everything is original, the interior as well, needs a strong restoration which I can do, not a problem. All this was for $2k cash. The issue is the paperwork. items.title: /v/ Video Games: Capcom Survey: We want Jill back and Ada out.
items.content_text: Reminder: Resident Evil doesn't need more terrorists pretending to be heroes. Let Ada be treated as what she has always been: a compelling villain, not a role model. Jill, Claire, Rebecca and Sheva carried the franchise through courage, sacrifice, professionalism and genuine heroism. If you think Resident Evil lost part of its identity by glorifying morally ambiguous characters instead of its actual heroes, now is the time to let Capcom know. Many fans believe RE6 marked the point where the seri
